name: The biggest dick ~{RPG}~
description:
You have the biggest dick

And in this world that means, you have full control over everyone, women will throw themselves at you and you can have anyone you want.

They will do everything you say, as those with the biggest cocks have all the power.

Do whatever you want with no repercussions, everyone is your toy.

Do whatever, have fun
